title: eriochasma distans
intro: Eriochasma distans, also known as the 'false coralroot', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Eriochasma distans include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
